lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do for fun on this ship? You know, when you're not doing pirate stuff.

lines.speaker: 'Eagle-eye' Shultz
lines.text: All sorts! Hide and seek, pin the patch on the pirate, walk the plank!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What a life! Wait a minute. 'Walk the plank'? Surely that's a bit dangerous?

lines.speaker: 'Eagle-eye' Shultz
lines.text: Well of course, but where's the fun without a few deaths?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll stick to Runelink.
